name: corrected-wide-v3-proof-holdout-v1-materialization

materialization.destination_policy: new nonexisting isolated directory outside the repository
preflight: verify every selection row is an exact full-manifest member by path, content hash, verdict, and family
verify every selected source query's SHA-256 before creating the destination
output_contract: verify every copied query byte for byte
write the selected manifest byte for byte as manifest-v1.json
verify the destination contains exactly the 1024 selected .smt2 paths and no other .smt2 files
refuse to overwrite an existing destination

execution.inherits: corrected-wide-v3-proof-holdout-v1-registration.json execution and acceptance fields without modification

claim_limits: The rejected attempt is packaging evidence only and contains no holdout result.
Materialization does not authorize selecting a replacement row, adapting a timeout, or changing an acceptance gate.
The corrected executions remain correctness and deployability evidence, not performance or prevalence evidence.
